name: project-setup
description: Architectural decision-maker for repos — new and existing. Triggers when the user makes any layout, structural, or convention decision: where a file or folder belongs, monorepo vs polyrepo, adding or splitting services, picking a database or ML orchestrator, docker / compose layout, env-config split, secrets, design tokens, modularity, mobile / desktop targets. Not only bootstrap — equally for restructuring established repos. One slash command (/ps-setup) with init | audit | suggest modes. Composes with sibling `dstack` and `documentation-guide` skills.
